location.name: Monte Palace Tropical Garden
location.summary: A hillside garden above Funchal, known for tropical plants, water features and city views.
location.imageAlt: Monte Palace Tropical Garden above Funchal

article.intro: Monte Palace Tropical Garden sits above Funchal in the cooler hills of Monte. It is an easy way to combine gardens, city views and the famous cable-car route from Funchal.
article.history: The garden developed around the historic Monte Palace estate and is now known for its landscaped paths, lakes and collections of plants and art.
highlights: Tropical and subtropical plants on hillside paths
A natural pairing with the Funchal–Monte cable car
article.practicalTip: Wear comfortable shoes: the garden is large and has slopes, steps and uneven paths.
